query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.serviceId, s.id as sid, s.name as sname, s.targetCustomer FROM campaigns c LEFT JOIN services s ON c.serviceId = s.id WHERE c.id = 90002;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.serviceId, s.id as sid, s.name as sname, s.targetCustomer FROM campaigns c LEFT JOIN services s ON c.serviceId = s.id WHERE c.id = 90002;

rows.name: The Incredible You Coach Training — Webinar Campaign
